title: Manage payment methods
excerpt: Use dynamic payment methods or manually define the payment methods to allow per checkout session. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/payment-methods.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/payment-methods.md?payment-ui=embedded-page) - [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/payment-methods.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
